svg.title: Registry-free deployment pipeline for demo-service
svg.desc: Flowchart showing six steps: local build, save image tar, scp to VM, k3s import, helm upgrade, and running cluster. Annotations explain the rationale for key decisions.
svg.text: Rust sidecar (text-tools) deploys identically — separate Helm chart, same pipeline
Pipeline retains last 3 remote releases — rollback is helm rollback + prior tar
